'''wabuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearthought|fearthought]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearthought|fearthought]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wabuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæbijith|wæbijith]] || [[word:wæbijij|wæbijij]] || [[word:wæbijish|wæbijish]] || [[word:wæbiji|wæbiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wabubujuth|wabubujuth]] || [[word:wabubujuj|wabubujuj]] || [[word:wabubujush|wabubujush]] || [[word:wabubuju|wabubuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabujuth|wabujuth]] || [[word:wabujuj|wabujuj]] || [[word:wabujush|wabujush]] || [[word:wabuju|wabuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabufjuth|wabufjuth]] || [[word:wabufjuj|wabufjuj]] || [[word:wabufjush|wabufjush]] || [[word:wabufjuf|wabufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wabujuthu|wabujuthu]] || [[word:wabujuju|wabujuju]] || [[word:wabujushu|wabujushu]] || [[word:wabujuku|wabujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wabujuth|wabujuth]] || [[word:wabujuj|wabujuj]] || [[word:wabujush|wabujush]] || [[word:wabuju|wabuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wabujuthul|wabujuthul]] || [[word:wabujujul|wabujujul]] || [[word:wabujushul|wabujushul]] || [[word:wabujukul|wabujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wabujuthuthu|wabujuthuthu]] || [[word:wabujujuju|wabujujuju]] || [[word:wabujushushu|wabujushushu]] || [[word:wabujuku|wabujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wabujuthun|wabujuthun]] || [[word:wabujujun|wabujujun]] || [[word:wabujushun|wabujushun]] || [[word:wabujukun|wabujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wabujuthuoro|wabujuthuoro]] || [[word:wabujujuoro|wabujujuoro]] || [[word:wabujushuoro|wabujushuoro]] || [[word:wabujukuoro|wabujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
